summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of PHASE 28.1 Microstructure Snapshot Engine. All 16 unit tests and 16 API endpoint tests passed successfully. All required endpoints are functional with proper response structures and validation.
passed_tests: All 16 unit tests (spread calculation, depth scoring, state classifications, etc.)
GET /api/v1/microstructure/current/{symbol} - Returns complete snapshot with all required fields
GET /api/v1/microstructure/summary/{symbol} - Returns aggregated statistics and state counts
GET /api/v1/microstructure/history/{symbol} - Returns historical records with limit parameter
Spread BPS calculation correctness (0.1-100 bps range)
Invalid symbol handling (graceful fallback with simulated data)
Summary aggregation logic (state counts match total records)

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 16 API tests and 16 unit tests passed
